svg.title: Mermaid critical regions
svg.desc: Demonstrates Mermaid critical and option fragments mapped onto sequencer fragment branches. From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with: node sequencer.js --mermaid -i test/mermaid-features/11-critical-regions/input.mmd -o -f -t test/mermaid-features/11-critical-regions
svg.text: Demonstrates Mermaid critical and option fragments mapped onto sequencer fragment branches.
